moves.name: Accelerock
moves.shortDescEn: Usually goes first.
moves.descEn: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 通常は最初に進みます。
moves.descJa: 追加効果はない。

moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

moves.descEn: Power doubles if the user has no held item.

moves.descJa: Power doubles if the user has no held item.

moves.name: Acupressure
moves.shortDescEn: Raises a random stat of the user or an ally by 2.
moves.descEn: Raises a random stat by 2 stages as long as the stat is not already at stage 6. The user can choose to use this move on itself or an adjacent ally. Fails if no stat stage can be raised or if used on an ally with a substitute.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises a random stat of the user or an ally by 2.
moves.descJa: Raises a random stat by 2 stages as long as the stat is not already at stage 6. The user can choose to use this move on itself or an adjacent ally. Fails if no stat stage can be raised or if used on an ally with a substitute.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.shortDescEn: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.descEn: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.descJa: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: After You
moves.shortDescEn: The target makes its move right after the user.
moves.descEn: The target makes its move immediately after the user this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target would have moved next anyway, or if the target already moved this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: The target makes its move right after the user.
moves.descJa: The target makes its move immediately after the user this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target would have moved next anyway, or if the target already moved this turn.

moves.descJa: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

moves.descJa: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.descEn: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% confuse target that had a stat rise this turn.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.shortDescEn: User and ally swap positions; using again can fail.
moves.descEn: The user swaps positions with its ally. Fails if the user is the only Pokemon on its side. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails or if the user's last move used is not Ally Switch.
moves.shortDescJa: User and ally swap positions; using again can fail.
moves.descJa: The user swaps positions with its ally. Fails if the user is the only Pokemon on its side. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails or if the user's last move used is not Ally Switch.

moves.descEn: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage.

moves.descJa: 10%の確率で自身の攻撃・防御・特攻・特防・素早さを1段階上げる。

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.shortDescEn: User recovers 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.descEn: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn while it remains active. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will receive the healing effect.
moves.shortDescJa: User recovers 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.descJa: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn while it remains active. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will receive the healing effect.

moves.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.descEn: No additional effect.

moves.descJa: 追加効果はない。

moves.descJa: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.descEn: Raises the target's Special Defense by 1 stage. Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises an ally's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.descJa: Raises the target's Special Defense by 1 stage. Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user.

moves.name: Assurance
moves.shortDescEn: Power doubles if target was damaged this turn.
moves.descEn: Power doubles if the target has already taken damage this turn, other than direct damage from Belly Drum, confusion, Curse, or Pain Split.
moves.shortDescJa: Power doubles if target was damaged this turn.
moves.descJa: Power doubles if the target has already taken damage this turn, other than direct damage from Belly Drum, confusion, Curse, or Pain Split.

moves.name: Attract
moves.shortDescEn: A target of the opposite gender gets infatuated.
moves.descEn: Causes the target to become infatuated, making it unable to attack 50% of the time. Fails if both the user and the target are the same gender, if either is genderless, or if the target is already infatuated. The effect ends when either the user or the target is no longer active. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: A target of the opposite gender gets infatuated.
moves.descJa: Causes the target to become infatuated, making it unable to attack 50% of the time. Fails if both the user and the target are the same gender, if either is genderless, or if the target is already infatuated. The effect ends when either the user or the target is no longer active. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.

moves.name: Aura Sphere
moves.shortDescEn: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.descEn: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.descJa: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Aura Wheel
moves.shortDescEn: Morpeko: Electric; Hangry: Dark; 100% +1 Spe.
moves.descEn: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage. If the user is a Morpeko in Full Belly Mode, this move is Electric type. If the user is a Morpeko in Hangry Mode, this move is Dark type. This move cannot be used successfully unless the user's current form, while considering Transform, is Full Belly or Hangry Mode Morpeko.
moves.shortDescJa: Morpeko: Electric; Hangry: Dark; 100% +1 Spe.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage. If the user is a Morpeko in Full Belly Mode, this move is Electric type. If the user is a Morpeko in Hangry Mode, this move is Dark type. This move cannot be used successfully unless the user's current form, while considering Transform, is Full Belly or Hangry Mode Morpeko.

moves.name: Aurora Veil
moves.shortDescEn: For 5 turns, damage to allies halved. Snow only.
moves.descEn: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical and special attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle; does not reduce damage further with Reflect or Light Screen. Critical hits ignore this protection. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Brick Break and Psychic Fangs remove the effect before damage is calculated. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails unless the weather is Snow.
moves.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, damage to allies halved. Snow only.
moves.descJa: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical and special attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle; does not reduce damage further with Reflect or Light Screen. Critical hits ignore this protection. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Brick Break and Psychic Fangs remove the effect before damage is calculated. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails unless the weather is Snow.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.shortDescEn: Power doubles if user is damaged by the target.
moves.descEn: Power doubles if the user was hit by the target this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Power doubles if user is damaged by the target.
moves.descJa: Power doubles if the user was hit by the target this turn.

moves.name: Axe Kick
moves.shortDescEn: 30% confusion. User loses 50% max HP if miss.
moves.descEn: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage.
moves.shortDescJa: 30% confusion. User loses 50% max HP if miss.
moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage.

moves.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
moves.shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Attack by 1.
moves.descEn: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target's Attack by 1.
moves.descJa: 対象の攻撃力を1段階下げる。

moves.name: Baneful Bunker
moves.shortDescEn: Protects from moves. Contact: poison.
moves.descEn: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user become poisoned. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Protects from moves. Contact: poison.
moves.descJa: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user become poisoned. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Baton Pass
moves.shortDescEn: User switches, passing stat changes and more.
moves.descEn: The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party. The selected Pokemon has the user's stat stage changes transferred to it, as well as the effects of confusion, Aqua Ring, Curse, Dragon Cheer, Embargo, Focus Energy, Gastro Acid, Heal Block, Ingrain, Leech Seed, Lock-On (Mind Reader), Magnet Rise, Perish Song, Power Trick, Telekinesis, and a substitute with its remaining HP. The effect of Gastro Acid is not transferred if the recipient has an Ability that cannot be affected.
moves.shortDescJa: User switches, passing stat changes and more.
moves.descJa: The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party. The selected Pokemon has the user's stat stage changes transferred to it, as well as the effects of confusion, Aqua Ring, Curse, Dragon Cheer, Embargo, Focus Energy, Gastro Acid, Heal Block, Ingrain, Leech Seed, Lock-On (Mind Reader), Magnet Rise, Perish Song, Power Trick, Telekinesis, and a substitute with its remaining HP. The effect of Gastro Acid is not transferred if the recipient has an Ability that cannot be affected.

moves.name: Beak Blast
moves.shortDescEn: Burns on contact with the user before it moves.
moves.descEn: If the user is hit by a contact move this turn before it can execute this move, the attacker is burned.
moves.shortDescJa: Burns on contact with the user before it moves.
moves.descJa: If the user is hit by a contact move this turn before it can execute this move, the attacker is burned.

moves.name: Beat Up
moves.shortDescEn: All healthy allies aid in damaging the target.
moves.descEn: Hits one time for the user and one time for each unfainted Pokemon without a non-volatile status condition in the user's party. The power of each hit is equal to 5+(X/10), where X is each participating Pokemon's base Attack; each hit is considered to come from the user.
moves.shortDescJa: All healthy allies aid in damaging the target.
moves.descJa: Hits one time for the user and one time for each unfainted Pokemon without a non-volatile status condition in the user's party. The power of each hit is equal to 5+(X/10), where X is each participating Pokemon's base Attack; each hit is considered to come from the user.

moves.name: Belch
moves.shortDescEn: Fails unless the user has eaten a Berry.
moves.descEn: Fails unless the user has eaten a Berry, either by eating one that was held, stealing and eating one off another Pokemon with Bug Bite or Pluck, or eating one that was thrown at it with Fling. Once the condition is met, this move can be selected and used for the rest of the battle even if the user gains or uses another item or switches out. Consuming a Berry with Natural Gift does not count for the purposes of eating one.
moves.shortDescJa: Fails unless the user has eaten a Berry.
moves.descJa: Fails unless the user has eaten a Berry, either by eating one that was held, stealing and eating one off another Pokemon with Bug Bite or Pluck, or eating one that was thrown at it with Fling. Once the condition is met, this move can be selected and used for the rest of the battle even if the user gains or uses another item or switches out. Consuming a Berry with Natural Gift does not count for the purposes of eating one.

moves.name: Belly Drum
moves.shortDescEn: User loses 50% max HP. Maximizes Attack.
moves.descEn: Raises the user's Attack by 12 stages in exchange for the user losing 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down. Fails if the user would faint or if its Attack stat stage is 6.
moves.shortDescJa: User loses 50% max HP. Maximizes Attack.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's Attack by 12 stages in exchange for the user losing 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down. Fails if the user would faint or if its Attack stat stage is 6.

moves.name: Bind
moves.shortDescEn: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.descEn: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.descEn: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.descEn: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio. 10% chance to burn.
moves.descEn: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: High critical hit ratio. 10% chance to burn.
moves.descJa: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.shortDescEn: 10% chance to freeze foe(s). Can't miss in Snow.
moves.descEn: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target. If the weather is Snow, this move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: 10% chance to freeze foe(s). Can't miss in Snow.
moves.descJa: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target. If the weather is Snow, this move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Block
moves.shortDescEn: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.descEn: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
moves.shortDescJa: ターゲットのスイッチアウトを防ぎます。
moves.descJa: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.

moves.name: Body Press
moves.shortDescEn: Uses user's Def stat as Atk in damage calculation.
moves.descEn: Damage is calculated using the user's Defense stat as its Attack, including stat stage changes. Other effects that modify the Attack stat are used as normal.
moves.shortDescJa: Uses user's Def stat as Atk in damage calculation.
moves.descJa: Damage is calculated using the user's Defense stat as its Attack, including stat stage changes. Other effects that modify the Attack stat are used as normal.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.shortDescEn: 30% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descEn: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: 30% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Bone Rush
moves.shortDescEn: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descEn: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.shortDescEn: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
moves.descEn: No additional effect.

moves.name: Bounce
moves.shortDescEn: Bounces turn 1. Hits turn 2. 30% paralyze.
moves.descEn: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Bounces turn 1. Hits turn 2. 30% paralyze.
moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.descEn: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: Has 33% recoil.
moves.descJa: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.shortDescEn: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
moves.descEn: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.

moves.descEn: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.descJa: 追加効果はない。

moves.name: Bullet Seed
moves.shortDescEn: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descEn: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Burn Up
moves.shortDescEn: User's Fire type becomes typeless; must be Fire.
moves.descEn: Fails unless the user is a Fire type. If this move is successful and the user is not Terastallized, the user's Fire type becomes typeless as long as it remains active.
moves.shortDescJa: User's Fire type becomes typeless; must be Fire.
moves.descJa: 使用者がほのおタイプでないと失敗する。この移動が成功し、ユーザーが Terastallized されていない場合、ユーザーの Fire タイプは、アクティブなままである限りタイプレスになります。

moves.name: Burning Jealousy
moves.shortDescEn: 100% burns a target that had a stat rise this turn.
moves.descEn: Has a 100% chance to burn the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% burns a target that had a stat rise this turn.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to burn the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.shortDescEn: Raises the user's Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.descEn: Raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user's Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Ceaseless Edge
moves.shortDescEn: Sets a layer of Spikes on the opposing side.
moves.descEn: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. A maximum of three layers may be set, and opponents lose 1/8 of their maximum HP with one layer, 1/6 of their maximum HP with two layers, and 1/4 of their maximum HP with three layers, all rounded down. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: Sets a layer of Spikes on the opposing side.
moves.descJa: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Charge

moves.descEn: Raises the user's Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's next Electric-type attack will have its power doubled; the effect ends when the user is no longer active, or after the user attempts to use any Electric-type move besides Charge, even if it is not successful.
moves.shortDescJa: +1 SpD, user's next Electric move 2x power.

moves.descEn: If both the user and the target have not fainted, the target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. This effect fails if the target is under the effect of Ingrain, has the Suction Cups Ability, or this move hit a substitute.

moves.name: Comeuppance
moves.shortDescEn: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
moves.descEn: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.

Fails if no move has been used, or if the last move used was Assist, Baneful Bunker, Beak Blast, Behemoth Bash, Behemoth Blade, Belch, Bestow, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Circle Throw, Combat Torque, Copycat, Counter, Covet, Destiny Bond, Detect, Dragon Tail, Dynamax Cannon, Endure, Feint, Focus Punch, Follow Me, Helping Hand, Hold Hands, King's Shield, Magical Torque, Mat Block, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Protect, Rage Powder, Roar, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Snatch, Spiky Shield, Spotlight, Struggle, Switcheroo, Tera Starstorm, Thief, Transform, Trick, Whirlwind, or Wicked Torque.

This move cannot cause Pokemon with the Sticky Hold Ability to lose their held item or cause a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, a Silvally, a Zacian, or a Zamazenta to lose their Blue Orb, Red Orb, Griseous Orb, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, or Rusted Shield respectively. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.descEn: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Mail or Z-Crystal, or if the target is a Kyogre holding a Blue Orb, a Groudon holding a Red Orb, a Giratina holding a Griseous Orb, an Arceus holding a Plate, a Genesect holding a Drive, a Silvally holding a Memory, or a Pokemon that can Mega Evolve holding the Mega Stone for its species. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will continue to be affected. Fails if there is no target or if the target is already affected.

If this move is successful and whether or not the target's evasiveness was affected, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, Mist, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Sticky Web end for the target's side, and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Sticky Web end for the user's side. Ignores a target's substitute, although a substitute will still block the lowering of evasiveness. If there is a terrain active and this move is successful, the terrain will be cleared.

moves.name: Detect
moves.shortDescEn: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
moves.descEn: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.

This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. moves.name: Dragon Darts
moves.shortDescEn: Hits twice. Doubles: Tries to hit each foe once.
moves.descEn: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit. In Double Battles, this move attempts to hit the targeted Pokemon and its ally once each. If hitting one of these Pokemon would be prevented by immunity, protection, semi-invulnerability, an Ability, or accuracy, it attempts to hit the other Pokemon twice instead. If this move is redirected, it hits that target twice.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits twice. Doubles: Tries to hit each foe once.
moves.descJa: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit. In Double Battles, this move attempts to hit the targeted Pokemon and its ally once each. If hitting one of these Pokemon would be prevented by immunity, protection, semi-invulnerability, an Ability, or accuracy, it attempts to hit the other Pokemon twice instead. If this move is redirected, it hits that target twice.

moves.descJa: 追加効果はない。

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.shortDescEn: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descEn: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.shortDescEn: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.descEn: If both the user and the target have not fainted, the target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. This effect fails if the target used Ingrain previously, has the Suction Cups Ability, or this move hit a substitute.
moves.shortDescJa: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.

moves.name: Electric Terrain
moves.shortDescEn: 5 turns. Grounded: +Electric power, can't sleep.
moves.descEn: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Electric Terrain. During the effect, the power of Electric-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot fall asleep; Pokemon already asleep do not wake up. Grounded Pokemon cannot become affected by Yawn or fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into an Electric type, Nature Power becomes Thunderbolt, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause paralysis. Fails if the current terrain is Electric Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: 5 turns. Grounded: +Electric power, can't sleep.
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、地形は電気地形になります。効果中、じめんポケモンのでんきタイプの攻撃の威力が1.3倍になり、じめんポケモンはねむりできなくなる。すでに眠っているポケモンは目覚めません。地上ポケモンはあくびの影響を受けたり、その効果で眠ったりすることはできません。カモフラージュはユーザーを電気タイプに変換し、ネイチャーパワーはサンダーボルトに、シークレットパワーは30％の確率で麻痺を引き起こします。現在の地形が電気地形の場合は失敗します。

moves.name: Electrify
moves.shortDescEn: Changes the target's move to Electric this turn.
moves.descEn: Causes the target's move to become Electric type this turn. Among effects that can change a move's type, this effect happens last. Fails if the target already moved this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the target's move to Electric this turn.
moves.descJa: Causes the target's move to become Electric type this turn. Among effects that can change a move's type, this effect happens last. Fails if the target already moved this turn.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.shortDescEn: More power the faster the user is than the target.
moves.descEn: The power of this move depends on (user's current Speed / target's current Speed), rounded down. Power is equal to 150 if the result is 4 or more, 120 if 3, 80 if 2, 60 if 1, 40 if less than 1. If the target's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 40.
moves.shortDescJa: More power the faster the user is than the target.
moves.descJa: The power of this move depends on (user's current Speed / target's current Speed), rounded down. Power is equal to 150 if the result is 4 or more, 120 if 3, 80 if 2, 60 if 1, 40 if less than 1. If the target's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 40.

moves.name: Electro Shot
moves.shortDescEn: Raises Sp. Atk by 1, hits turn 2. Rain: no charge.
moves.descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move still requires a turn to charge.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises Sp. Atk by 1, hits turn 2. Rain: no charge.
moves.descJa: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move still requires a turn to charge.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.

moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Encore
moves.shortDescEn: Target repeats its last move for its next 3 turns.
moves.descEn: For its next 3 turns, the target is forced to repeat its last move used. If the affected move runs out of PP, the effect ends. Fails if the target is already under this effect, if it has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if the move is Assist, Blazing Torque, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Encore, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Transform, or Wicked Torque.
moves.shortDescJa: Target repeats its last move for its next 3 turns.
moves.descJa: For its next 3 turns, the target is forced to repeat its last move used. If the affected move runs out of PP, the effect ends. moves.name: Endeavor
moves.shortDescEn: Lowers the target's HP to the user's HP.
moves.descEn: Deals damage to the target equal to (target's current HP - user's current HP). The target is unaffected if its current HP is less than or equal to the user's current HP.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target's HP to the user's HP.
moves.descJa: Deals damage to the target equal to (target's current HP - user's current HP). The target is unaffected if its current HP is less than or equal to the user's current HP.

moves.name: Endure
moves.shortDescEn: User survives attacks this turn with at least 1 HP.
moves.descEn: The user will survive attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn with at least 1 HP. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: User survives attacks this turn with at least 1 HP.
moves.descJa: The user will survive attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn with at least 1 HP. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.descEn: Causes the target's Ability to become the same as the user's. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, or the same Ability as the user, or if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.shortDescEn: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.descEn: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Fling
moves.shortDescEn: Flings the user's item at the target. Power varies.
moves.descEn: The power of this move is based on the user's held item. The held item is lost and it activates for the target if applicable. If there is no target or the target avoids this move by protecting itself, the user's held item is still lost. The user can regain a thrown item with Recycle or the Harvest Ability. Fails if the user has no held item, if the held item cannot be thrown, if the user is under the effect of Embargo or Magic Room, or if the user has the Klutz Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Flings the user's item at the target. Power varies.
moves.descJa: The power of this move is based on the user's held item. The held item is lost and it activates for the target if applicable. If there is no target or the target avoids this move by protecting itself, the user's held item is still lost. The user can regain a thrown item with Recycle or the Harvest Ability. Fails if the user has no held item, if the held item cannot be thrown, if the user is under the effect of Embargo or Magic Room, or if the user has the Klutz Ability.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.shortDescEn: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.descEn: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.descJa: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

moves.name: Flower Trick
moves.shortDescEn: Always results in a critical hit; no accuracy check.
moves.descEn: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities. This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: Always results in a critical hit; no accuracy check.
moves.descJa: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities. This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Fly
moves.shortDescEn: Flies up on first turn, then strikes the next turn.
moves.descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Flies up on first turn, then strikes the next turn.
moves.descJa: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Flying Press
moves.shortDescEn: Combines Flying in its type effectiveness.
moves.descEn: This move combines Flying in its type effectiveness against the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: Combines Flying in its type effectiveness.
moves.descJa: This move combines Flying in its type effectiveness against the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.descJa: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Focus Energy
moves.shortDescEn: Raises the user's critical hit ratio by 2.
moves.descEn: Raises the user's chance for a critical hit by 2 stages. Fails if the user already has the effect. Baton Pass can be used to transfer this effect to an ally.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user's critical hit ratio by 2.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's chance for a critical hit by 2 stages. Fails if the user already has the effect. Baton Pass can be used to transfer this effect to an ally.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.shortDescEn: Fails if the user takes damage before it hits.
moves.descEn: The user loses its focus and does nothing if it is hit by a damaging attack this turn before it can execute the move.
moves.shortDescJa: Fails if the user takes damage before it hits.
moves.descJa: The user loses its focus and does nothing if it is hit by a damaging attack this turn before it can execute the move.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.shortDescEn: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
moves.descEn: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.
moves.shortDescJa: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
moves.descJa: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.

moves.name: Forest's Curse
moves.shortDescEn: Adds Grass to the target's type(s).
moves.descEn: Causes the Grass type to be added to the target, effectively making it have two or three types. Fails if the target is already a Grass type. If Trick-or-Treat adds a type to the target, it replaces the type added by this move and vice versa.
moves.shortDescJa: Adds Grass to the target's type(s).
moves.descJa: ターゲットに草タイプを追加し、実質的に 2 つまたは 3 つのタイプを持つようにします。対象が既に草タイプの場合は失敗する。トリック・オア・トリートでターゲットにタイプを追加すると、この動きによって追加されたタイプが置き換えられ、その逆も同様です。

moves.name: Foul Play
moves.shortDescEn: Uses target's Attack stat in damage calculation.
moves.descEn: Damage is calculated using the target's Attack stat, including stat stage changes. The user's Ability, item, and burn are used as normal.
moves.shortDescJa: Uses target's Attack stat in damage calculation.
moves.descJa: Damage is calculated using the target's Attack stat, including stat stage changes. The user's Ability, item, and burn are used as normal.

moves.name: Freeze-Dry
moves.shortDescEn: Super effective on Water.
moves.descEn: This move's type effectiveness against Water is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is.
moves.shortDescJa: Super effective on Water.
moves.descJa: This move's type effectiveness against Water is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is.

moves.name: Frenzy Plant
moves.shortDescEn: User cannot move next turn.
moves.descEn: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: User cannot move next turn.
moves.descJa: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Frost Breath
moves.shortDescEn: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.descEn: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.descJa: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.shortDescEn: Hits two turns after being used.
moves.descEn: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if this move or Doom Desire is already in effect for the target's position.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits two turns after being used.
moves.descJa: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if this move or Doom Desire is already in effect for the target's position.

moves.name: Gastro Acid
moves.shortDescEn: Nullifies the target's Ability.
moves.descEn: Causes the target's Ability to be rendered ineffective as long as it remains active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain under this effect. If the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, this move fails, and receiving the effect through Baton Pass ends the effect immediately.
moves.shortDescJa: Nullifies the target's Ability.
moves.descJa: Causes the target's Ability to be rendered ineffective as long as it remains active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain under this effect. moves.shortDescJa: Paralyzes the target.
moves.descJa: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.shortDescEn: More power the heavier the target.
moves.descEn: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.
moves.shortDescJa: More power the heavier the target.
moves.descJa: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.shortDescEn: User on Grassy Terrain: +1 priority.
moves.descEn: If the current terrain is Grassy Terrain and the user is grounded, this move has its priority increased by 1.
moves.shortDescJa: User on Grassy Terrain: +1 priority.
moves.descJa: If the current terrain is Grassy Terrain and the user is grounded, this move has its priority increased by 1.

moves.name: Grassy Terrain
moves.shortDescEn: 5 turns. Grounded: +Grass power, +1/16 max HP.
moves.descEn: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain. During the effect, the power of Grass-type attacks used by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3, the power of Bulldoze, Earthquake, and Magnitude used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5, and grounded Pokemon have 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn, including the last turn. Camouflage transforms the user into a Grass type, Nature Power becomes Energy Ball, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause sleep. Fails if the current terrain is Grassy Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: 5 turns. Grounded: +Grass power, +1/16 max HP.
moves.descJa: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain. During the effect, the power of Grass-type attacks used by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3, the power of Bulldoze, Earthquake, and Magnitude used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5, and grounded Pokemon have 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn, including the last turn. Camouflage transforms the user into a Grass type, Nature Power becomes Energy Ball, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause sleep. Fails if the current terrain is Grassy Terrain.

moves.name: Grav Apple
moves.shortDescEn: Target: 100% -1 Def. During Gravity: 1.5x power.
moves.descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. Power is multiplied by 1.5 during Gravity's effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Target: 100% -1 Def. During Gravity: 1.5x power.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. Power is multiplied by 1.5 during Gravity's effect.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.shortDescEn: 5 turns: no Ground immunities, 1.67x accuracy.
moves.descEn: For 5 turns, the evasiveness of all active Pokemon is multiplied by 0.6. At the time of use, Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, and Telekinesis end immediately for all active Pokemon. During the effect, Bounce, Fly, Flying Press, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, Splash, and Telekinesis are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. Ground-type attacks, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability can affect Flying types or Pokemon with the Levitate Ability. Fails if this move is already in effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 5 turns: no Ground immunities, 1.67x accuracy.
moves.descJa: For 5 turns, the evasiveness of all active Pokemon is multiplied by 0.6. At the time of use, Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, and Telekinesis end immediately for all active Pokemon. During the effect, Bounce, Fly, Flying Press, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, Splash, and Telekinesis are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. Ground-type attacks, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability can affect Flying types or Pokemon with the Levitate Ability. Fails if this move is already in effect.

moves.name: Growth
moves.shortDescEn: Raises user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1; 2 in Sun.
moves.descEn: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land, this move raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella, this move will only raise the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage, even if the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1; 2 in Sun.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land, this move raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella, this move will only raise the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage, even if the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.shortDescEn: Averages Defense and Sp. Def stats with target.
moves.descEn: The user and the target have their Defense and Special Defense stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Defense and Special Defense stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: 平均防御力とSp。ターゲットによる防御ステータス。
moves.descJa: The user and the target have their Defense and Special Defense stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Defense and Special Defense stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.

moves.shortDescJa: Swaps Defense and Sp. Def changes with target.
moves.descJa: The user swaps its Defense and Special Defense stat stage changes with the target.

moves.name: Guillotine
moves.shortDescEn: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
moves.descEn: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: オーコスがターゲット。ユーザーがそれ以下のレベルの場合は失敗します。
moves.descJa: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

moves.name: Gyro Ball

moves.descEn: Power is equal to (25 * target's current Speed / user's current Speed) + 1, rounded down, but not more than 150. If the user's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 1.
moves.shortDescJa: More power the slower the user than the target.

moves.shortDescJa: More power the more HP the target has left.
moves.descJa: Power is equal to 100 * (target's current HP / target's maximum HP), rounded half down, but not less than 1.

moves.name: Heal Bell
moves.shortDescEn: Cures the user's party of all status conditions.
moves.descEn: Every Pokemon in the user's party is cured of its non-volatile status condition. Active Pokemon with the Soundproof Ability are not cured, unless they are the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Cures the user's party of all status conditions.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.shortDescEn: Heals the target by 50% of its max HP.
moves.descEn: The target restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user has the Mega Launcher Ability, the target instead restores 3/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the target by 50% of its max HP.

moves.name: Healing Wish
moves.shortDescEn: User faints. Next hurt Pokemon is fully healed.
moves.descEn: The user faints, and if the Pokemon brought out to replace it does not have full HP or has a non-volatile status condition, its HP is fully restored along with having any non-volatile status condition cured. The replacement is sent out at the end of the turn, and the healing happens before hazards take effect. This effect continues until a Pokemon that meets either of these conditions switches in at the user's position or gets swapped into the position with Ally Switch. Fails if the user is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.shortDescEn: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.descEn: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Ingrain
moves.shortDescEn: Traps/grounds user; heals 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.descEn: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP restored at the end of each turn, but it is prevented from switching out and other Pokemon cannot force the user to switch out. The user can still switch out if it uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. If the user leaves the field using Baton Pass, the replacement will remain trapped and still receive the healing effect. During the effect, the user can be hit normally by Ground-type attacks and be affected by Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web, even if the user is a Flying type or has the Levitate Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Traps/grounds user; heals 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.descJa: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP restored at the end of each turn, but it is prevented from switching out and other Pokemon cannot force the user to switch out. The user can still switch out if it uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. If the user leaves the field using Baton Pass, the replacement will remain trapped and still receive the healing effect. During the effect, the user can be hit normally by Ground-type attacks and be affected by Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web, even if the user is a Flying type or has the Levitate Ability.

moves.name: Instruct
moves.shortDescEn: The target immediately uses its last used move.
moves.descEn: The target immediately uses its last used move. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, if the target is preparing to use Beak Blast, Focus Punch, or Shell Trap, or if the move is Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Ice Ball, Instruct, King's Shield, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Obstruct, Outrage, Petal Dance, Rollout, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Thrash, Transform, Uproar, Wicked Torque, any two-turn move, or any recharge move.

moves.name: King's Shield
moves.shortDescEn: Protects from damaging attacks. Contact: -1 Atk.
moves.descEn: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon trying to make contact with the user have their Attack lowered by 1 stage. Non-damaging moves go through this protection. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Knock Off

moves.descEn: If the target is holding an item that can be removed from it, ignoring the Sticky Hold Ability, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. If the user has not fainted, the target loses its held item. This move cannot cause Pokemon with the Sticky Hold Ability to lose their held item or cause a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, a Silvally, a Zacian, or a Zamazenta to lose their Blue Orb, Red Orb, Griseous Orb, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, or Rusted Shield respectively. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.descEn: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
moves.descJa: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.

moves.descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's special attack this turn.

moves.name: Misty Explosion
moves.shortDescEn: User faints. User on Misty Terrain: 1.5x power.
moves.descEn: If the current terrain is Misty Terrain and the user is grounded, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: User faints. User on Misty Terrain: 1.5x power.

moves.name: Misty Terrain
moves.shortDescEn: 5 turns. Can't status,-Dragon power vs grounded.
moves.descEn: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Misty Terrain. During the effect, the power of Dragon-type attacks used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5 and grounded Pokemon cannot be inflicted with a non-volatile status condition nor confusion. Grounded Pokemon can become affected by Yawn but cannot fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into a Fairy type, Nature Power becomes Moonblast, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower Special Attack by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Misty Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: 5 turns. Can't status,-Dragon power vs grounded.
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、地形は霧の地形になります。効果中、じめんポケモンに対するドラゴンタイプの技の威力が0.5倍になり、じめんポケモンは状態異常・混乱状態にならない。地上ポケモンはあくびの影響を受ける可能性がありますが、その効果で眠りにつくことはできません。カモフラージュは使用者をフェアリータイプに、ネイチャーパワーはムーンブラストに、シークレットパワーは30％の確率で特攻を1段階下げる。現在の地形がMisty Terrainの場合は失敗します。

moves.name: Outrage
moves.shortDescEn: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.descEn: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

moves.shortDescEn: Lowers target's Atk, Sp. Atk by 1. User switches.
moves.descEn: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If this move is successful, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if the target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages were both unchanged, or if there are no unfainted party members.

moves.name: Payback

moves.descEn: Power doubles if the user moves after the target this turn, including actions taken through Instruct or the Dancer Ability. Switching in does not count as an action.

moves.name: Perish Song
moves.shortDescEn: All active Pokemon will faint in 3 turns.
moves.descEn: Each active Pokemon receives a perish count of 4 if it doesn't already have a perish count. At the end of each turn including the turn used, the perish count of all active Pokemon lowers by 1 and Pokemon faint if the number reaches 0. The perish count is removed from Pokemon that switch out. If a Pokemon uses Baton Pass while it has a perish count, the replacement will gain the perish count and continue to count down.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.shortDescEn: Disappears turn 1. Hits turn 2. Breaks protection.
moves.descEn: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Pin Missile
moves.shortDescEn: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descEn: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
