moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.shortDescEn: Power doubles and type varies in each weather.
moves.descEn: Power doubles if a weather condition other than Delta Stream is active, and this move's type changes to match. Ice type during Snow, Water type during Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, Rock type during Sandstorm, and Fire type during Desolate Land or Sunny Day. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and uses Weather Ball during Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Desolate Land, or Sunny Day, this move remains Normal type and does not double in power.
moves.shortDescJa: Power doubles and type varies in each weather.
moves.descJa: Power doubles if a weather condition other than Delta Stream is active, and this move's type changes to match. Ice type during Snow, Water type during Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, Rock type during Sandstorm, and Fire type during Desolate Land or Sunny Day. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and uses Weather Ball during Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Desolate Land, or Sunny Day, this move remains Normal type and does not double in power.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.shortDescEn: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.descEn: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.shortDescEn: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.descEn: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.descJa: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.shortDescEn: Protects allies from multi-target moves this turn.
moves.descEn: The user and its party members are protected from moves made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn that target all adjacent foes or all adjacent Pokemon. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: Protects allies from multi-target moves this turn.
moves.descJa: The user and its party members are protected from moves made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn that target all adjacent foes or all adjacent Pokemon. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

moves.descEn: At the end of the next turn, the Pokemon at the user's position has 1/2 of the user's maximum HP restored to it, rounded down. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's position.

moves.shortDescEn: Puts the target to sleep after 1 turn.
moves.descEn: Causes the target to fall asleep at the end of the next turn. Fails when used if the target cannot fall asleep or if it already has a non-volatile status condition. At the end of the next turn, if the target is still active, does not have a non-volatile status condition, and can fall asleep, it falls asleep. If the target becomes affected, this effect cannot be prevented by Safeguard or a substitute, or by falling asleep and waking up during the effect.

abilities.name: Adaptability

abilities.name: Aerilate
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Flying type and have 1.2x power.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技がひこうタイプになり、威力が1.2倍になる。

abilities.name: Aftermath
abilities.shortDescEn: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is knocked out with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down. This effect is prevented if the move's user has the Magic Guard Ability or if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
abilities.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.
abilities.descJa: このポケモンが接触技で気絶した場合、その技の使用者は最大HPの1/4（切り捨て）を失う。技の使用者がマジックガード能力を持っている場合、またはアクティブなポケモンが湿り能力を持っている場合、この効果は防止されます。

abilities.name: Air Lock
abilities.shortDescEn: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
abilities.descEn: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
abilities.shortDescJa: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
abilities.descJa: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.

abilities.name: Analytic

abilities.name: Commander

abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is a Tatsugiri and a Dondozo is an active ally, this Pokemon goes into the Dondozo's mouth. The Dondozo has its Attack, Special Attack, Speed, Defense, and Special Defense raised by 2 stages. During the effect, the Dondozo cannot be switched out, this Pokemon cannot select an action, and attacks targeted at this Pokemon will be avoided but it will still take indirect damage. If this Pokemon faints during the effect, a Pokemon can be switched in as a replacement but the Dondozo remains unable to be switched out. If the Dondozo faints during the effect, this Pokemon regains the ability to select an action.

abilities.name: Delta Stream
abilities.shortDescEn: On switch-in, strong winds begin until this Ability is not active in battle.
abilities.descEn: On switch-in, the weather becomes Delta Stream, which removes the weaknesses of the Flying type from Flying-type Pokemon. This weather remains in effect until this Ability is no longer active for any Pokemon, or the weather is changed by the Desolate Land or Primordial Sea Abilities.
abilities.shortDescJa: スイッチインすると、このアビリティが戦闘でアクティブでなくなるまで、強風が始まります。
abilities.descJa: スイッチインすると天気がデルタストリームになり、ひこうタイプのポケモンからひこうタイプの弱点がなくなる。この天気は、この能力がどのポケモンに対しても有効でなくなるまで、または荒れ果てた土地または原初の海の能力によって天気が変更されるまで、効果が続きます。

abilities.name: Desolate Land
abilities.shortDescEn: On switch-in, extremely harsh sunlight begins until this Ability is not active in battle.
abilities.descEn: On switch-in, the weather becomes Desolate Land, which includes all the effects of Sunny Day and prevents damaging Water-type moves from executing. This weather remains in effect until this Ability is no longer active for any Pokemon, or the weather is changed by the Delta Stream or Primordial Sea Abilities.
abilities.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このアビリティが戦闘でアクティブでなくなるまで、非常に厳しい日差しが降り注ぎます。
abilities.descJa: スイッチインすると、天気は荒涼とした土地になり、晴れの日のすべての効果が含まれ、ダメージを与える水タイプの動きが実行されなくなります。この天気は、この能力がどのポケモンに対しても有効でなくなるまで、またはデルタストリームまたは原初の海の能力によって天気が変更されるまで、効果が続きます。

abilities.name: Dry Skin
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon is healed 1/4 by Water, 1/8 by Rain; is hurt 1.25x by Fire, 1/8 by Sun.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon is immune to Water-type moves and restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when hit by a Water-type move. The power of Fire-type moves is multiplied by 1.25 when used on this Pokemon. At the end of each turn, this Pokemon restores 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, if the weather is Rain Dance, and loses 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, if the weather is Sunny Day. The weather effects are prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

abilities.name: Emergency Exit
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.
abilities.descEn: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, it immediately switches out to a chosen ally. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability. This effect applies to both direct and indirect damage, except Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, and confusion damage.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンは最大HPの1/2以下になると交代する。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンの最大HPが1/2を超え、ダメージを受けて最大HPの1/2以下になると、すぐに選んだ味方と交代する。この効果は多段ヒット技のすべてのヒット後に適用されます。この動きにシアーフォース能力によって削除された二次効果がある場合、この効果は防止されます。この効果は、使用時の呪いと身代わり、腹太鼓、痛みの分割、および混乱ダメージを除く、直接的および間接的なダメージの両方に適用されます。

abilities.descJa: このポケモンが発動している間、発動中のポケモンが使うフェアリータイプの技の威力は1.33倍になる。

abilities.name: Gulp Missile
abilities.shortDescEn: When hit after Surf/Dive, attacker takes 1/4 max HP and -1 Defense or paralysis.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is a Cramorant, it changes forme when it hits a target with Surf or uses the first turn of Dive successfully. It becomes Gulping Form with an Arrokuda in its mouth if it has more than 1/2 of its maximum HP remaining, or Gorging Form with a Pikachu in its mouth if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP remaining. If Cramorant gets hit in Gulping or Gorging Form, it spits the Arrokuda or Pikachu at its attacker, even if it has no HP remaining. The projectile deals damage equal to 1/4 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down; this damage is blocked by the Magic Guard Ability but not by a substitute. An Arrokuda also lowers the target's Defense by 1 stage, and a Pikachu paralyzes the target. Cramorant will return to normal if it spits out a projectile, switches out, or Dynamaxes.
abilities.shortDescJa: When hit after Surf/Dive, attacker takes 1/4 max HP and -1 Defense or paralysis.
abilities.descJa: If this Pokemon is a Cramorant, it changes forme when it hits a target with Surf or uses the first turn of Dive successfully. It becomes Gulping Form with an Arrokuda in its mouth if it has more than 1/2 of its maximum HP remaining, or Gorging Form with a Pikachu in its mouth if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP remaining. If Cramorant gets hit in Gulping or Gorging Form, it spits the Arrokuda or Pikachu at its attacker, even if it has no HP remaining. The projectile deals damage equal to 1/4 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down; this damage is blocked by the Magic Guard Ability but not by a substitute. An Arrokuda also lowers the target's Defense by 1 stage, and a Pikachu paralyzes the target. Cramorant will return to normal if it spits out a projectile, switches out, or Dynamaxes.

abilities.descJa: When this Pokemon switches in, it appears as the last unfainted Pokemon in its party until it takes direct damage from another Pokemon's attack. This Pokemon's actual level and HP are displayed instead of those of the mimicked Pokemon.

abilities.descEn: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it. If there is no Pokemon at that position, this Pokemon does not Transform.

abilities.name: Innards Out

abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is knocked out with a move, that move's user loses HP equal to the amount of damage inflicted on this Pokemon.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンが技で倒された場合、その技の使用者は同じだけHPを失う。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンが技で気絶した場合、その技の使い手はこのポケモンに与えたダメージと同じだけHPを失う。

abilities.descEn: This Pokemon is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability. The effects of Gravity, Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball nullify the immunity. Thousand Arrows can hit this Pokemon as if it did not have this Ability.

abilities.name: Libero

abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.

abilities.name: Light Metal

abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's weight is halved, rounded down to a tenth of a kilogram. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone. A Pokemon's weight will not drop below 0.1 kg.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's weight is halved.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's weight is halved, rounded down to a tenth of a kilogram. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone. A Pokemon's weight will not drop below 0.1 kg.

abilities.name: Lightning Rod
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon draws Electric moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Electric immunity.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Special Attack by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move. If this Pokemon is not the target of a single-target Electric-type move used by another Pokemon, this Pokemon redirects that move to itself if it is within the range of that move. If multiple Pokemon could redirect with this Ability, it goes to the one with the highest Speed, or in the case of a tie to the one that has had this Ability active longer.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon draws Electric moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Electric immunity.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Special Attack by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move. If multiple Pokemon could redirect with this Ability, it goes to the one with the highest Speed, or in the case of a tie to the one that has had this Ability active longer.

abilities.name: Magic Bounce
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon blocks certain Status moves and bounces them back to the user.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon is unaffected by certain non-damaging moves directed at it and will instead use such moves against the original user. Moves reflected in this way are unable to be reflected again by this or Magic Coat's effect. Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes can only be reflected once per side, by the leftmost Pokemon under this or Magic Coat's effect. The Lightning Rod and Storm Drain Abilities redirect their respective moves before this Ability takes effect.

The Lightning Rod and Storm Drain Abilities redirect their respective moves before this Ability takes effect.

If multiple targets are hit by an attack the item is stolen from the fastest Pokemon, while considering the effect of Trick Room and prioritizing opposing Pokemon before allies.

abilities.name: Mimicry

abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's types change to match the active Terrain when this Pokemon acquires this Ability, or whenever a Terrain begins. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain. If this Ability is acquired without an active Terrain, or a Terrain ends, this Pokemon's types become the original types for its species.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンは地形に合わせてタイプが変化する。 Terrain が終了するとタイプが元に戻ります。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンがこの能力を獲得したとき、または地形が始まるたびに、このポケモンのタイプはアクティブな地形に一致するように変わります。電気地形では電気タイプ、草地では草タイプ、霧地形ではフェアリータイプ、サイキック地形ではサイキックタイプになります。アクティブな地形なしでこの能力を取得した場合、または地形が終了した場合、このポケモンのタイプはその種族の元のタイプになります。

abilities.name: Mind's Eye

abilities.shortDescEn: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect.
abilities.descEn: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect. This Ability activates before hazards and other Abilities take effect. Does not affect the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.
abilities.shortDescJa: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect.
abilities.descJa: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect. This Ability activates before hazards and other Abilities take effect. Does not affect the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.

abilities.name: No Guard
abilities.shortDescEn: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
abilities.descEn: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
abilities.shortDescJa: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
abilities.descJa: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.

abilities.name: Normalize
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's moves are changed to be Normal type and have 1.2x power.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's moves are changed to be Normal type and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes before other effects that change a move's type.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンの技はノーマルタイプに変化し、威力が1.2倍になる。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンの技はノーマルタイプに変化し、威力が1.2倍になる。この効果は、技のタイプを変更する他の効果よりも先に適用されます。

abilities.name: Oblivious
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Immune to Intimidate.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Gaining this Ability while infatuated or taunted cures it. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Immune to Intimidate.
abilities.descJa: このポケモンは夢中になったり挑発したりすることができません。夢中または挑発されているときにこの能力を獲得すると、それが治ります。このポケモンは威嚇能力の影響を受けません。

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.shortDescEn: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.
abilities.descEn: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.
abilities.shortDescJa: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.
abilities.descJa: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.

abilities.name: Orichalcum Pulse
abilities.shortDescEn: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.
abilities.descEn: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.
abilities.shortDescJa: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.
abilities.descJa: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.

abilities.name: Overcoat
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, damage from Sandstorm, and the effects of Rage Powder and the Effect Spore Ability.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, damage from Sandstorm, and the effects of Rage Powder and the Effect Spore Ability.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.shortDescEn: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Grass attacks.
abilities.descEn: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Grass-type attack.
abilities.shortDescJa: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Grass attacks.
abilities.descJa: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Grass-type attack.

abilities.name: Own Tempo
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Immune to Intimidate.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Gaining this Ability while confused cures it. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Immune to Intimidate.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Gaining this Ability while confused cures it. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.

abilities.name: Parental Bond
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's damaging moves hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's damaging moves become multi-hit moves that hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered. Does not affect Doom Desire, Dragon Darts, Dynamax Cannon, Endeavor, Explosion, Final Gambit, Fling, Future Sight, Ice Ball, Rollout, Self-Destruct, any multi-hit move, any move that has multiple targets, or any two-turn move.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンのダメージ技は2回ヒットする。 2回目の攻撃ではダメージが4分の1になります。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンのダメージ技は2回ヒットする多段ヒット技になる。 2回目の攻撃ではダメージが4分の1になります。ドゥーム デザイア、ドラゴン ダーツ、ダイマックス キャノン、エンデバー、エクスプロージョン、ファイナル ギャンビット、フリング、フューチャー サイト、アイス ボール、ロールアウト、セルフ デストラクト、マルチヒット ムーブ、複数のターゲットを持つムーブ、または 2 ターンのムーブには影響しません。

abilities.name: Pastel Veil
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon and its allies cannot be poisoned. On switch-in, cures poisoned allies.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon and its allies cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while this Pokemon or its ally is poisoned cures them. If this Ability is being ignored during an effect that causes poison, this Pokemon is cured immediately but its ally is not.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンとその仲間は毒状態にならない。スイッチインすると、毒状態の味方を治療します。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンとその仲間は毒状態にならない。このポケモンまたはその仲間が毒状態にあるときにこの能力を得ることで、そのポケモンを治すことができます。毒を引き起こす効果中にこの能力が無視されている場合、このポケモンはすぐに治りますが、味方は治りません。

abilities.name: Perish Body
abilities.shortDescEn: Making contact with this Pokemon starts the Perish Song effect for it and the attacker.
abilities.descEn: Making contact with this Pokemon starts the Perish Song effect for it and the attacker. This effect does not happen for this Pokemon if the attacker already has a perish count.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンと接触すると、そのポケモンと攻撃者に「滅びの歌」効果が開始されます。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンと接触すると、そのポケモンと攻撃者に「滅びの歌」効果が開始されます。攻撃側がすでに消滅カウントを持っている場合、このポケモンにはこの効果は発生しません。

abilities.name: Pickpocket
abilities.shortDescEn: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.
abilities.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item.
abilities.descJa: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

abilities.name: Pickup
abilities.shortDescEn: If this Pokemon has no item, it finds one used by an adjacent Pokemon this turn.
abilities.descEn: At the end of each turn, if this Pokemon is not holding an item and at least one adjacent Pokemon used an item during this turn, one of those Pokemon is selected at random and this Pokemon obtains that Pokemon's last used item. An item is not considered the last used if it was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by another Pokemon with this Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be picked up.
abilities.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has no item, it finds one used by an adjacent Pokemon this turn.
abilities.descJa: At the end of each turn, if this Pokemon is not holding an item and at least one adjacent Pokemon used an item during this turn, one of those Pokemon is selected at random and this Pokemon obtains that Pokemon's last used item. An item is not considered the last used if it was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by another Pokemon with this Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be picked up.

abilities.name: Piercing Drill
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore a target's protection and deal 1/4 the usual damage.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore a target's protection and deal 1/4 the usual damage.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンの接触技は対象の守りを無視し、通常の1/4のダメージを与える。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンの接触技は対象の守りを無視し、通常の1/4のダメージを与える。

abilities.name: Pixilate
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy type and have 1.2x power.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy type and have 1.2x power.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

abilities.name: Plus
abilities.shortDescEn: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.
abilities.descEn: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5.
abilities.shortDescJa: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.
abilities.descJa: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5.

abilities.name: Poison Heal
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon is healed by 1/8 of its max HP each turn when poisoned; no HP loss.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is poisoned, it restores 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn instead of losing HP.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is healed by 1/8 of its max HP each turn when poisoned; no HP loss.
abilities.descJa: このポケモンがどく状態にある場合、HPが減る代わりにターン終了時に最大HPの1/8（切り捨て）が回復する。

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.shortDescEn: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
abilities.descEn: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
abilities.shortDescJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
abilities.descJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.

abilities.name: Poison Puppeteer
abilities.shortDescEn: Pecharunt: If this Pokemon poisons a target, the target also becomes confused.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is a Pecharunt and poisons or badly poisons a target, the target also becomes confused.
abilities.shortDescJa: ペシャルント: このポケモンが対象を毒状態にすると、対象も混乱状態になる。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンがペシャルントで、ターゲットを毒またはひどい毒にすると、ターゲットも混乱状態になります。

abilities.name: Poison Touch
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning. This effect comes after a move's inherent secondary effect chance.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning. This effect comes after a move's inherent secondary effect chance.

abilities.name: Power Construct
abilities.shortDescEn: If Zygarde 10%/50%, changes to Complete if at 1/2 max HP or less at end of turn.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is a Zygarde in its 10% or 50% Forme, it changes to Complete Forme when it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP at the end of the turn.
abilities.shortDescJa: ジガルデの場合10%/50%、ターン終了時に最大HPが1/2以下の場合コンプリートに変化。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンが10％または50％フォルムのジガルデの場合、ターン終了時のHPが最大の1/2以下になるとコンプリートフォルムに変化する。

abilities.name: Power of Alchemy
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.

abilities.name: Power Spot
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3. This affects Doom Desire and Future Sight, even if the user is not on the field.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3. This affects Doom Desire and Future Sight, even if the user is not on the field.

abilities.name: Prankster
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's Status moves have priority raised by 1, but Dark types are immune.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by 1. Opposing Dark-type Pokemon are immune to these moves, and any move called by these moves, if the resulting user of the move has this Ability.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Status moves have priority raised by 1, but Dark types are immune.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by 1. Opposing Dark-type Pokemon are immune to these moves, and any move called by these moves, if the resulting user of the move has this Ability.

abilities.name: Pressure
abilities.shortDescEn: If this Pokemon is the target of a foe's move, that move loses one additional PP.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is the target of an opposing Pokemon's move, that move loses one additional PP. Imprison, Snatch, and Tera Blast also lose one additional PP when used by an opposing Pokemon, but Sticky Web does not.
abilities.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is the target of a foe's move, that move loses one additional PP.
abilities.descJa: If this Pokemon is the target of an opposing Pokemon's move, that move loses one additional PP. Imprison, Snatch, and Tera Blast also lose one additional PP when used by an opposing Pokemon, but Sticky Web does not.

abilities.name: Primordial Sea
abilities.shortDescEn: On switch-in, heavy rain begins until this Ability is not active in battle.
abilities.descEn: On switch-in, the weather becomes Primordial Sea, which includes all the effects of Rain Dance and prevents damaging Fire-type moves from executing. This weather remains in effect until this Ability is no longer active for any Pokemon, or the weather is changed by the Delta Stream or Desolate Land Abilities.
abilities.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このアビリティが戦闘でアクティブでなくなるまで激しい雨が降り始めます。
abilities.descJa: スイッチインすると、天気は原初の海になり、レインダンスのすべての効果が含まれ、ダメージを与える火タイプの動きが実行されなくなります。この天候は、この能力がどのポケモンに対しても有効でなくなるまで、またはデルタストリームまたは荒れ果てた土地の能力によって天気が変更されるまで、効果が続きます。

abilities.name: Prism Armor
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

abilities.name: Propeller Tail
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.

abilities.name: Protean
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.

abilities.name: Protosynthesis
abilities.shortDescEn: Sunny Day active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.
abilities.descEn: If Sunny Day is active or this Pokemon uses a held Booster Energy, this Pokemon's highest stat is multiplied by 1.3, or by 1.5 if the highest stat is Speed. Stat stage changes are considered at the time this Ability activates. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order. If this effect was started by Sunny Day, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Sunny Day is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.
abilities.shortDescJa: Sunny Day active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.
abilities.descJa: If Sunny Day is active or this Pokemon uses a held Booster Energy, this Pokemon's highest stat is multiplied by 1.3, or by 1.5 if the highest stat is Speed. Stat stage changes are considered at the time this Ability activates. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order. If this effect was started by Sunny Day, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Sunny Day is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.

abilities.name: Psychic Surge
abilities.shortDescEn: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.

abilities.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.
abilities.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.

abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's sound-based moves have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes halved damage from sound-based moves.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from sound moves. Its own have 1.3x power.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's sound-based moves have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes halved damage from sound-based moves.

abilities.name: Pure Power
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon's Attack is doubled.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon's Attack is doubled.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is doubled.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon's Attack is doubled.

abilities.name: Purifying Salt
abilities.shortDescEn: Ghost damage to this Pokemon dealt with a halved offensive stat; can't be statused.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn. If a Pokemon uses a Ghost-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon.
abilities.shortDescJa: Ghost damage to this Pokemon dealt with a halved offensive stat; can't be statused.
abilities.descJa: このポケモンは不揮発性の状態異常やあくびの影響を受けない。ポケモンがこのポケモンに対してゴーストタイプの技を使った場合、そのポケモンの攻撃力はこのポケモンへのダメージ計算時に半分になる。

If this effect was started by Electric Terrain, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Electric Terrain is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.
abilities.shortDescJa: Electric Terrain active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.

abilities.descJa: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.

abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.
abilities.descEn: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, it immediately switches out to a chosen ally. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability. This effect applies to both direct and indirect damage, except Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, and confusion damage.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンは最大HPの1/2以下になると交代する。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンの最大HPが1/2を超え、ダメージを受けて最大HPの1/2以下になると、すぐに選んだ味方と交代する。この効果は多段ヒット技のすべてのヒット後に適用されます。この動きにシアーフォース能力によって削除された二次効果がある場合、この効果は防止されます。この効果は、使用時の呪いと身代わり、腹太鼓、痛みの分割、および混乱ダメージを除く、直接的および間接的なダメージの両方に適用されます。

abilities.name: Wind Power
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.
abilities.shortDescJa: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.

abilities.name: Wind Rider
abilities.shortDescEn: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon is immune to wind moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.
abilities.shortDescJa: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.
abilities.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to wind moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.

abilities.name: Wonder Guard
abilities.shortDescEn: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.
abilities.descEn: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.
abilities.shortDescJa: このポケモンは超効果的な動きと間接ダメージによってのみダメージを受けることができます。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンは超効果的な動きと間接ダメージによってのみダメージを受けることができます。

abilities.name: Wonder Skin
abilities.shortDescEn: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.
abilities.descEn: Non-damaging moves that check accuracy have their accuracy changed to 50% when used against this Pokemon. This effect comes before other effects that modify accuracy.
abilities.shortDescJa: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.
abilities.descJa: Non-damaging moves that check accuracy have their accuracy changed to 50% when used against this Pokemon. This effect comes before other effects that modify accuracy.

abilities.name: Zen Mode
abilities.shortDescEn: If Darmanitan, at end of turn changes Mode to Standard if > 1/2 max HP, else Zen.
abilities.descEn: If this Pokemon is a Darmanitan or Galarian Darmanitan, it changes to Zen Mode if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP at the end of a turn. If Darmanitan's HP is above 1/2 of its maximum HP at the end of a turn, it changes back to Standard Mode.
abilities.shortDescJa: ダルマニタンの場合、ターン終了時に最大HPの1/2を超える場合はモードをスタンダードに変更し、そうでない場合は禅に変更します。
abilities.descJa: このポケモンがダルマニタンまたはガラルダルマニタンの場合、ターン終了時のHPが最大の1/2以下になるとゼンモードに変化する。ターン終了時にダルマニタンのHPが最大HPの1/2を超えている場合、スタンダードモードに戻ります。
